channel.title: openapi-spec Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the openapi-spec codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: OpenApiSpecification Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: Central domain managing the API contracts, endpoint definitions, and data schemas for the Supermodel platform. Architectural overview of the OpenApiSpecification domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: PackageInfrastructure Domain — openapi-spec Architecture
item.description: Handles the distribution, versioning, and lifecycle management of the specification via npm. Architectural overview of the PackageInfrastructure domain in the openapi-spec codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: package.json — openapi-spec Source File
item.description: Architecture documentation for package.json, a json file in the openapi-spec codebase.
